final:
// // This comment suggests the counter decrements on each clock cycle when enabled
module counter2bit_en (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    output reg [1:0] count
);always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 2'b00;
    end else if (en) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
